blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Campbelle stars as West Indies beat New Zealand with a ball to spare. Shemaine Campbelle finishes unbeaten on 90 as West Indies chase down 163 to beat defending champions New Zealand by seven wickets in Southampton in their opening match of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup
